title: Savory Smoky Spanish Chickpeas Salmorejo
description: A festive Spanish dish featuring chickpeas, lardons, and cheese, perfect for a special occasion. This herbal and cheesy salmorejo is keto-friendly and full of flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Render the lardons in a skillet over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the lardons from the skillet and set aside.
Add the garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chickpeas, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 10 minutes until the liquid has reduced slightly.
Stir in the shredded manchego cheese until melted and well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and top with the crispy lardons, chopped parsley, and a drizzle of olive oil.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
